what_it_does: Fork of Hugging Face Diffusers for pretrained diffusion pipelines, schedulers, and model building blocks for image/audio generation.
succinct_summary: Broad diffusion toolkit; relevant conceptually for generation but not avatar-specific by itself.
possible_use: Useful reference for image generation/inpainting pipeline code if the avatar stack needs custom diffusion integration.
important_notes: Large general-purpose library fork; prefer upstream docs unless this fork has ClipDrop-specific changes.
